_doc:
Tier-2 final v9 finalists sweep across all 9 clips (incl. darkTest). Stacks the validated winners from prior overnight sweeps to find the best production v9 pipeline. Winners we are stacking: (a) dark_v9 = CLAHE + auto gamma -- mean +0.0056, darkTest +0.0502 (validated in v9_stack_validation), (b) sam_stride1 = SAM 2.1 verifier on every box -- mean +0.0023, darkTest +0.0185, loveTest +0.0082 (validated in sam_verifier_v1), (c) pose_min_vis_strict = RTMW pose-merge gate with min_vis=0.5 -- mean +0.0003, MotionTest +0.0027 (validated in rtmw_pose_merge_v1).

CRITICAL CAVEAT: The darktest_push_v1 sweep showed dark_v9 + sam_stride1 on darkTest = 0.6931 (vs dark_v9 alone = 0.7027), so they NEGATIVELY interact on darkTest. We test the full 9-clip mean here to see if loveTest/other gains outweigh the darkTest loss.
